features.title: Sample Depth Option
features.description: Choose 16-bit, 24-bit, or preserve the original sample depth when converting.

instructions.text: Click the Format button to open format settings
Choose sample depth: 16-bit, 24-bit, or preserve original

features.title: Sample Conversion via ffmpeg
features.description: Convert audio files with WAV, sample rate, depth, mono, and normalize options.

instructions.text: Click Convert to convert files with WAV, rate, depth, mono, or normalize options

features.title: File Browser
features.description: Navigate folders and use breadcrumbs to move between levels.

instructions.text: Use the file browser to navigate folders
Click the root breadcrumb to go to top level

features.title: Search and Preview Work Simultaneously
features.description: Search for files while listening to audio previews.

instructions.text: Search for files while previewing audio

features.title: Format Settings Dialog
features.description: Configure sample rate, depth, mono, and normalize for conversions.

instructions.text: Open Format Settings to configure sample rate, depth, mono, and normalize
